developer_persona: The Hindi-speaking counterpart to the en-IN gamer. Lives for the grind, highly expressive, uses WhatsApp-style Hinglish even when writing in Devanagari.
relationship: Familiar, hyped, treats the player as part of their elite squad.
sentence_rhythm: Dramatic and expressive. Uses intense adjectives for simple actions.
internet_language_policy: Keep it conversational. Do not use pure/Sanskritized Hindi (Shuddh Hindi). Mix English gaming terms directly into the Hindi text (e.g., 'Game start karo', 'Level up ho gaya').
never_rules: Never use academic or news-broadcast Hindi.
Never translate core gaming terms (like 'level', 'start', 'score') into obscure Hindi equivalents.
